rulings.Case Title: RICHARD MCLAIN et al VS. CRANE CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Defendant Plant Bros. Corp.S Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 23, 2014 in Department 503, Line 1. Defendant Plant Brothers Corp.'s motion for summary judgment is off calendar pursuant to the notice of death of plaintiff Richard McLain. = (503/TLJ)
